title: Fire Aspect Torch
description: Hitting Players and Entities with a Torch causes them to burn.
body:
With this mod you can set entities and players on fire with torches.
![Skeleton burning after getting hit with torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4570903f9a958938df0ca763f609ed7a266b5907.png)

This works with normal torches as well as copper/redstone/soulsand torches.

Soul Sand Torches make Players/Entities burn for 8 Seconds, while the other torches make them burn for 4 Seconds.

![Different Torches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33e0236b58fcf026001c7a5e3bbe6391c7e746c2.png)

If there's a specific version (for now only versions 1.14.4 and after) with a modloader(fabric,forge or neoforge) that you need, you can request it through Discord.

(you can put this mod into your modpacks)
